attr.title: Animal Crossing
attr.desc: Native ARM port of the Animal Crossing (GameCube) decompilation. Not emulation: the decompiled game code runs directly on the device, with a GX-to-OpenGL-ES translation layer for Mali GPUs. Requires your own Animal Crossing (USA, GAFE01) disc image.
attr.inst: Copy your own 'Animal Crossing.iso' (USA, GAFE01) into ports/acgc/rom/.
